strategy.pairing: 6 sub-games: Set A (3) our Cop vs partner Thief; Set B (3) our Thief vs partner Cop
strategy.turn_order_note: Our engine defaults to thief-first; protocol default is Cop-first. MUST be agreed in writing first.
recommended_default: Confirm baseline ruleset in writing (5x5, 6 sub-games, <=25 moves, no stay, <=5 cop barriers).
Agree coordinate origin/axes and turn order explicitly to avoid invalid games.
Exchange match-scoped tokens out-of-band; revoke after the match.
Warm-up interop on a small board (e.g. 3x3) before the official 5x5 run.
As Cop, prioritize capture (cop-win 20 > thief-win 10); as Thief, survive to max_moves.
Keep full transcripts; set mutual_agreement only when both reports match.
strategy.no_guarantee: Maximizes expected score and avoids invalid games; does NOT guarantee victory.
